title: Portuguese Bean Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Portugal, made with white beans and various spices.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a dense oil for a richer flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Stir-fry the onion and garlic until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the dried oregano, cumin, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the white beans, diced tomatoes, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
